articles.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Opus 4.6 with 1M Token Context Window
articles.content: Anthropic has released Claude Opus 4.6 featuring the first 1-million-token context window in public beta. The model introduces 'Agent Teams' for autonomous multi-agent coordination, native PowerPoint and Excel add-ins for business applications, and achieved 80.9% on SWE-Bench with 144 Elo point improvement over GPT-5.2. Pricing remains at $20/month with unchanged API costs.

articles.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.3 Codex with Native macOS App
articles.content: OpenAI announced GPT-5.3 Codex with integrated macOS accessibility and file-system APIs. Features include 'lazy-loading' context that saves 40% tokens on large codebases, achieved 92% on SWE-bench-Hard with 25% faster performance than GPT-5.2. Windows version planned for Q2 2026.

articles.title: Cursor 0.45 Update Adds Claude-Opus-4.6 and Multi-line Auto-complete
articles.content: Cursor IDE updated to version 0.45 with support for Claude-Opus-4.6, GPT-5.3, and local 'Fast-32B' model. Introduces real-time multi-line auto-complete features. Company reached 360k paying users at $20/month pricing.

articles.title: Anthropic Doubles Series F Funding to $20B at $350B Valuation
articles.content: Anthropic is doubling its Series F funding target to $20B led by Coatue and Singapore GIC at $350B pre-money valuation. Company revenue run-rate hit $9B by December 2025, up from $5.5B mid-year. Joint $60B capex pool announced by Nvidia, Microsoft, Amazon & OpenAI for 2026 infrastructure.

articles.title: AMD MI-350X GPU Sampling with 288GB HBM3e Memory
articles.content: AMD MI-350X (CDNA-4) is sampling to hyperscalers with 288GB HBM3e memory. NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra B200H delayed to April 2026 due to yield issues. TSMC 1.6nm (A16) node fully booked for 2027 by Apple and Qualcomm. Google published 'Ironwood' TPU-v7 paper showing 1.7× performance per watt improvement.

articles.title: Hangzhou Targets 100+ AI Cross-Border E-commerce Models by 2026
articles.content: Hangzhou city is targeting 100+ production-grade AI + cross-border e-commerce models by end of 2026. Current leaders include Unitree Robotics with AI-powered fitness pumps and ManyCore's 3D AI renderer. Alibaba's AI Business Assistant is used by 30,000 SMEs for multilingual content creation, reporting 37% increase in overseas exposure.

articles.title: 90% of Digital Content Will Be AI-Generated by 2026
articles.content: Elon Musk forecasts 90% of digital content will be AI-generated by 2026. xAI's Grok-3 model aims to create full-length films from text prompts. 75% of marketing videos are now AI-generated or AI-assisted. Companies report $3.5M savings in creative costs with 40% reduction in design hours.
